<dashup-grid-layout>
    <dashup-text-input name="location"
                       placeholder='Enter the location here...'
                       value="Karlsruhe"
                       layout='{"row": 1, "offset": 0, "size": 8}'>
    </dashup-text-input>
    <dashup-button text="Send"
                   mode="display"
                   dataAPI="http://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?units=metric&appid=524da7907b1939626510c547ae65d67c&q=%location%"
                   params="location"
                   consumers='[{"temperature": "apiData main temp"},{"humidity": "apiData main humidity"}]'
                   layout='{"row": 1, "offset": 1, "size": 3}'
                   handleOnStart>
    </dashup-button>
    <dashup-display name="temperature"
                    label="Temperature"
                    quantity="°C"
                    layout='{"row": 2, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-display>
    <dashup-display name="humidity"
                    label="Humidity"
                    quantity="%"
                    layout='{"row": 3, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-display>
</dashup-grid-layout>

<dashup-grid-layout>
    <dashup-text-input name="code"
                       placeholder='Enter the share code here...'
                       value="SAP"
                       layout='{"row": 1, "offset": 0, "size": 8}'>
    </dashup-text-input>
    <dashup-button text="Send"
                   mode="display"
                   dataAPI="https://api.iextrading.com/1.0/stock/%code%/chart"
                   params="code"
                   consumers='[{"price": "apiData 19 high"},{"development": "apiData 19 changePercent"}]'
                   layout='{"row": 1, "offset": 1, "size": 3}'
                   handleOnStart>
    </dashup-button>
    <dashup-display name="development"
                    label="Development"
                    quantity="%"
                    layout='{"row": 2, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-display>
    <dashup-display name="price"
                    label="Share Value"
                    quantity="$"
                    layout='{"row": 3, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-display>
</dashup-grid-layout>

<dashup-grid-layout>
    <dashup-text-input name="todo"
                       placeholder='Enter a task'
                       layout='{"row": 1, "offset": 0, "size": 8}'
                       clear>
    </dashup-text-input>
    <dashup-button text="Add"
                   mode="add"
                   dataAPI="http://localhost:9004/loadTodo"
                   storageAPI="http://localhost:9004/todo"
                   consumers='{"list": "todo", "list": "apiData list"}'
                   producers="todo"
                   layout='{"row": 1, "offset": 1, "size": 3}'
                   handleOnStart>
    </dashup-button>
    <dashup-list name="list"
                 selectable="true"
                 layout='{"row": 2, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-list>
    <dashup-button text="Delete"
                   mode="delete"
                   storageAPI="http://localhost:9004/todo"
                   consumers='{"list": "list"}'
                   producers="list"
                   layout='{"row": 3, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-button>
</dashup-grid-layout>

<dashup-grid-layout>
    <dashup-list name="financeList"
                 layout='{"row": 1, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-list>
    <dashup-text-input name="amount"
                       placeholder="Amount"
                       layout='{"row": 2, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'
                       clear>
    </dashup-text-input>
    <dashup-radio-button-group name="category"
                               layout='{"row": 3, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
        <dashup-radio-button group="category"
                             value="Family"
                             checked>
        </dashup-radio-button>
        <dashup-radio-button group="category"
                             value="Housing">
        </dashup-radio-button>
        <dashup-radio-button group="category"
                             value="Meals">
        </dashup-radio-button>
        <dashup-radio-button group="category"
                             value="Investments">
        </dashup-radio-button>
    </dashup-radio-button-group>
    <dashup-button text="Add"
                   mode="add"
                   dataAPI="http://localhost:9004/loadFinanceList"
                   storageAPI="http://localhost:9004/financeList"
                   consumers='[{"financeList": ""},{"financeList": "apiData financeList"}]'
                   producers="amount category"
                   layout='{"row": 4, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'
                   handleOnStart>
    </dashup-button>
    <dashup-button text="Del"
                   mode="delete"
                   storageAPI="http://localhost:9004/financeChart"
                   consumers='[{"financeList": ""},{"financeList": "apiData financeList"}]'
                   producers="financeList"
                   layout='{"row": 5, "offset": 0, "size": 12}'>
    </dashup-button>
</dashup-grid-layout>
